datasync.locationfsxontap.protocol.CfnAb: Specifies the data transfer protocol that AWS DataSync uses to access your Amazon FSx file system.

datasync.locationfsxontap.protocol.NFS.Description: Specifies the Network File System (NFS) protocol configuration that DataSync uses to access your FSx for ONTAP file system's storage virtual machine (SVM).

datasync.locationfsxontap.protocol.SMB.Description: Specifies the Server Message Block (SMB) protocol configuration that DataSync uses to access your FSx for ONTAP file system's SVM.
